message:
fix(policy): audit denied cross-tenant accesses for forensic reporting

BoundaryCheckResult::requires_audit() previously only recorded allowed
cross-boundary accesses. Denied attempts were silently dropped, causing
ForensicReport.namespace_violations to be empty for deny scenarios.
Fix: audit all cross-boundary accesses (both allowed and denied).

Also fixes ForensicQuery with end_ms=0 to use u64::MAX instead of
now_ms parameter, ensuring unbounded queries capture all decision log
entries regardless of clock source.

All 444 policy tests + 38 namespace isolation tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
